ground_truth:
PRE-OPERATIVE ASSESSMENT

Patient: Dorothy Adams  DOB: 09/01/1948
MRN: 223456
Scheduled Procedure: Total knee arthroplasty, right
Date of Surgery: 25/01/2024
Surgeon: Dr. Anderson, Orthopedics

American Society of Anesthesiologists (ASA) Classification: III

Medical History:
1. Osteoarthritis, right knee (primary indication)
2. Hypertension - controlled on Lisinopril
3. Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus - controlled on Metformin
4. Hyperlipidemia
5. BMI: 32 (obese)

Medications:
- Lisinopril 20mg daily
- Metformin 1000mg twice daily
- Atorvastatin 40mg daily
- Metoprolol 25mg twice daily

Allergies: Penicillin (rash)

Pre-operative Labs: CBC, CMP, PT/INR, type and screen - ordered
Pre-operative ECG: Ordered
Chest X-ray: Not indicated

Anesthesia Plan: Spinal anesthesia with sedation

Risk Assessment:
DVT Prophylaxis: Sequential compression devices + Enoxaparin
Antibiotic Prophylaxis: Cefazolin 2g IV within 1 hour of incision

Notes: Hold Metformin 24h prior to surgery. Hold Lisinopril morning of surgery.

Dr. Anderson, MD
Reviewed: 23/01/2024
